# B&B [PROPERTY_NAME]

> Family-run Bed & Breakfast in Castiglione della Pescaia, Maremma Toscana, Italy. Direct seafront location since [YEAR].

## Overview

B&B [PROPERTY_NAME] is a family-run bed and breakfast located directly on the seafront in Castiglione della Pescaia, in the Maremma Toscana region of Tuscany, Italy. The property has been welcoming guests since [YEAR] and offers 4 B&B rooms and 2 self-catering apartments.

The property is located at [ADDRESS], 58043 Castiglione della Pescaia (GR), Italy. Coordinates: [LAT], [LNG]. The town centre is a 9-minute walk away.

## Rooms (4 total, max 3 guests each)

- **Standard Room**: Double room with private balcony. Air conditioning, TV, mini fridge, free WiFi, private bathroom.
- **Classic Room**: Double room with lateral sea view. Air conditioning, TV, mini fridge, free WiFi, private bathroom.
- **Classic with Balcony**: Double room with balcony and sea view. Air conditioning, TV, mini fridge, free WiFi, private bathroom.
- **Superior Sea View**: Double or triple room with frontal sea view. Air conditioning, TV, mini fridge, free WiFi, private bathroom.

All B&B rooms include breakfast served in the main dining room overlooking the sea. No pets in B&B rooms.

## Apartments (2 total)

- **Sea View Apartment**: 2 bedrooms, 1 bathroom, max 4 guests. Fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, AC, WiFi, TV, sea view. **Pets allowed (small)**.
- **Garden Apartment**: 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, max 6 guests. Fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, AC, WiFi, TV, private garden, private parking. **Pets allowed (small)**. Walking distance to beach.

## Amenities (all accommodations)

Free WiFi throughout, air conditioning, private parking (free, gated courtyard), direct beach access (B&B rooms), TV, mini fridge / kitchen

## Key Facts

- Check-in: 14:30–18:00
- Check-out: by 10:00
- Breakfast: included in B&B room rate, served in sea-view dining room
- Parking: free, private, gated, not supervised
- Pets: not allowed in B&B rooms; small pets welcome in apartments
- Languages spoken: Italian, English, German
- Payment: cash and credit card accepted, currency EUR

## Location & Surroundings

Castiglione della Pescaia, 22 km from Grosseto, awarded 5 Sails (Legambiente) and European Blue Flag. The property has direct private beach access.

Nearby:
- Diaccia Botrona nature reserve: 8 min walk (birdwatching, wetlands)
- Rocchette beach: 12 min drive
- Cala Violina beach: 14 min drive (quartz sand, nature reserve)
- Fattoria Le Mortelle winery (Antinori): 11 min drive
- Punta Ala beach: 19 min drive
- Parco dell'Uccellina (WWF): 60 min drive
- Tarot Garden (Niki de Saint Phalle): 60 min drive

- Phone: [PHONE]
- Email: [EMAIL]
- Address: [ADDRESS], 58043 Castiglione della Pescaia (GR), Italy
